item.title: 曝 DeepSeek 开发自研 AI 推理芯片
item.guid: 曝-DeepSeek-开发自研-AI-推理芯片
item.description:
According to Reuters, citing sources, DeepSeek is developing its own AI chips, aiming to reduce its reliance on Nvidia chips. 据路透社援引知情人士消息称，DeepSeek 正在开发自有 AI 芯片，目标是降低对英伟达芯片的依赖。

Sources said that the chips DeepSeek is developing are primarily for inference scenarios, which involve the computational process where trained models generate answers for users, rather than for training new models. If successful, DeepSeek will further enter the field of semiconductor design. 知情人士称，DeepSeek 正在研发的芯片主要面向推理场景，也就是已训练模型为用户生成回答的计算环节，而非用于训练新模型。如果进展顺利，DeepSeek 将进一步切入半导体设计领域。

Three sources stated that DeepSeek's chip project is still in its early stages, and DeepSeek has begun reaching out to external partners and engaging in discussions with chip design, wafer foundry, and memory manufacturers. 三名知情人士表示，DeepSeek 的芯片项目仍处于早期阶段，DeepSeek 已开始接触外部合作伙伴，并与芯片设计、晶圆代工和存储厂商进行讨论。

One of the sources said that the relevant work started about a year ago. Two other sources revealed that DeepSeek has intensified its recruitment efforts for chip design engineers in recent months, but the recruitment is mainly conducted privately and no positions have been posted on public recruitment platforms. 其中一名人士称，相关工作约在一年前启动。另有两名人士透露，DeepSeek 近几个月加大了芯片设计工程师招聘力度，但招聘主要以私下方式进行，并未在公开招聘平台发布岗位。

item.title: 曝苹果折叠屏 iPhone 已在量产
item.guid: 曝苹果折叠屏-iPhone-已在量产
item.description:
According to the Shanghai Securities News, the progress of Apple's first foldable iPhone is accelerating, and it has now entered the mass production phase. 据《上海证券报》报道，苹果首款折叠屏 iPhone 的落地进度正在提速，目前已进入量产阶段。

Industry insiders revealed that Foxconn, the leading contract manufacturer, has already initiated large-scale recruitment to reserve manpower for the production of new devices. Relevant recruitment information shows that Ganzhou Foxconn issued a recruitment announcement yesterday, hiring employees aged 18 to 50 to engage in the production and processing of precision components for Apple phones; 产业人士透露，代工龙头富士康已率先启动大规模招工，为新机的生产储备人力。相关招聘信息显示，赣州富士康于昨日发布招募公告，招聘 18 至 50 岁员工从事苹果手机精密组件的生产与加工；

Foxconn's HR department also posted a recruitment notice for temporary workers the day before yesterday, with the recruitment scope covering the Longhua/Guanlan Apple A business group and the Longhua Sanying business group, both involved in the assembly of foldable iPhones. 富士康人资部门也于前日发文招募临时工，招聘范围覆盖了涉及折叠屏 iPhone 组装的龙华/观澜苹果 A 事业群以及龙华三赢事业群。

Regarding capacity planning, sources said Apple has asked suppliers to prepare for the production of approximately 10 million foldable iPhones this year, a figure that has been revised upwards from the 7-8 million units expected a few months ago. 在产能规划方面，知情人士称苹果已要求供应商为今年生产约 1000 万部折叠屏 iPhone 做好准备，这一数字较数月前 700 万至 800 万部的预期有所上调。

item.title: 前华为「天才少年」吐槽 DeepSeek 招聘流程
item.guid: 前华为「天才少年」吐槽-DeepSeek-招聘流程
item.description:
Li Bojie, a former Huawei "genius youth," publicly complained about DeepSeek's interview process on social media on July 6. He stated that no interview was arranged for half a month after passing the written test, and it was only after repeated urging that he entered the interview stage; the first two rounds of interviews were both coding interviews. 前华为「天才少年」李博杰 7 月 6 日在社交平台公开吐槽 DeepSeek 面试流程。他表示，笔试通过后半个月未安排面试，经过反复催促才进入面试环节；前两轮面试均为代码面试。

Li Bojie also mentioned that during the second interview, the interviewer was late and questioned him for copying code because he was using two screens during the coding interview, demanding that he stop copying code and stating that if he couldn't prove he wasn't copying, the interview couldn't continue. Li Bojie said he felt "severely offended" and decided to terminate the DeepSeek interview process and publicly expose it. 李博杰还提到，二面过程中面试官迟到，并在代码面试时因他使用两个屏幕而质疑其抄代码，要求他停止抄代码，还表示如果不能证明没有抄代码，面试无法继续。李博杰称自己「被严重冒犯」，已决定终止 DeepSeek 面试流程并公开曝光。

item.title: 今年 618 手机销量同比下滑 13%
item.guid: 今年-618-手机销量同比下滑-13%
item.description:
According to the latest data from Counterpoint Research, affected by rising storage chip costs and weakened promotional efforts, China's smartphone market saw a 13% year-on-year decline in sales during this year's "618" shopping festival. 据 Counterpoint Research 最新数据，受存储芯片成本上涨及促销力度减弱影响，中国智能手机市场在今年「618」购物节期间销量同比下降 13%。

During the period from May 26 to June 21, the performance of various brands in China's smartphone market showed significant differentiation. 在 5 月 26 日至 6 月 21 日期间，中国智能手机市场各品牌表现呈显著分化。

Ivan Lam, Senior Analyst at Counterpoint, pointed out that due to cost pressures, the pricing of new and old models this year is generally higher than the same period last year, and manufacturers' price reduction margins and coverage of models have both shrunk. Counterpoint 高级分析师 Ivan Lam 指出，受制于成本压力，今年新老机型的定价普遍高于去年同期，且厂商的降价幅度与覆盖机型范围均有所缩水。

    Huawei: Ranked first with a 21% market share, the only leading brand to achieve positive growth; Enjoy 90 Pro Max and Mate 80 are hot sellers;

    Apple: Although it ranked second in the market due to early subsidy policies, its total sales still declined by 9% year-on-year because the overall discount margin was less than that of the iPhone 16 series in the same period last year;

    Xiaomi: Suffered a double-digit decline, down 24% year-on-year, affected by overall weak demand and reduced promotions.

Counterpoint predicts that although "618" briefly boosted a month-on-month recovery in June's phone sales, the market will subsequently enter a seasonal slowdown period, and China's smartphone shipments are expected to record a double-digit decline for the full year. Counterpoint 预测，尽管「618」短暂拉动了 6 月份手机销量的环比回暖，但市场随后将进入季节性放缓期，预计今年中国智能手机全年出货量将录得双位数下降。

item.title: 小米调整小爱同学架构，模型、云端和端侧职责拆分
item.guid: 小米调整小爱同学架构，模型、云端和端侧职责拆分
item.description:
According to 36Kr Auto, Xiaomi Group recently carried out a new round of organizational structure adjustments for Xiaoai Voice Assistant. 据 36 氪汽车报道，小米集团近期对小爱同学进行新一轮组织架构调整。

    After the adjustment, Xiaoai Voice Assistant's foundational model capabilities come from the MiMo base large model team led by Luo Fuli;

    Luan Jian is responsible for the cloud capability development of MiMo within Xiaoai Voice Assistant's external engineering system;

    The on-device capability development, originally led by the Xiaoai product team, will be delegated to the OS teams of sub-business units such as mobile phones and automobiles.

Wang Gang, the former head of the Xiaoai team, has been transferred to the robotics business. Reports indicate that the Xiaoai team has shifted from primarily developing product features to creating AI supporting tools; in the future, specific functions of Xiaoai Assistant on terminals such as mobile phones and automobiles will be planned and developed by the corresponding business units. 原小爱团队负责人王刚已调任机器人业务。报道称，小爱团队从过去主要负责产品功能开发，转向打造 AI 配套工具；未来小爱同学在手机、汽车等终端上的具体功能，将由对应业务部门规划与开发。

Sources close to the business stated that the direct background of this adjustment is Xiaomi's reconstruction of its R&D system around AI technology on its terminals. 接近业务的人士称，这场调整的直接背景是小米在终端上围绕 AI 技术重新构建研发体系。

The report mentioned that Xiaomi plans to invest at least 60 billion yuan in AI over the next three years, building full-stack AI capabilities around businesses such as mobile phones, automobiles, smart manufacturing, and embodied intelligence. 报道提到，小米未来三年将在 AI 领域投入至少 600 亿元，围绕手机、汽车、智能制造和具身智能等业务构建 AI 全栈能力。

item.title: 今年香港最大 IPO 来了，果链巨头立讯精密定于本周四上市
item.guid: 今年香港最大-IPO-来了，果链巨头立讯精密定于本周四上市
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple supplier Luxshare Precision plans to set its Hong Kong IPO offering price at HK$63.28 per share, which is the upper limit of the previously set offering range. At this price, Luxshare Precision is expected to raise HK$24.3 billion (approximately RMB 21.075 billion). 据彭博社报道，苹果供应商立讯精密计划将其香港 IPO 发行价定为每股 63.28 港元，即此前设定的招股区间上限。按此价格计算，立讯精密预计将募资 243 亿港元（约合 210.75 亿元人民币）。

Luxshare Precision is issuing a total of 383.5 million shares. The pricing of HK$63.28 per share represents a discount of approximately 13% compared to its closing price of RMB 62.88 in the Shenzhen stock market yesterday. It is reported that due to strong investor interest, the company closed its offering early last Friday, instead of the originally scheduled Monday. 立讯精密此次共发行 3.835 亿股。每股 63.28 港元的定价较其昨日在深圳股市 62.88 元人民币的收盘价折让约 13%。据悉，由于投资者认购踊跃，该公司已于上周五提前结束招股，而非原定的本周一。

This IPO is expected to be Hong Kong's largest new share offering this year, surpassing the HK$23.1 billion raised by Shenghong Technology's listing in April. 此次 IPO 预计将成为香港今年规模最大的新股发行，超过了今年 4 月胜宏科技上市时 231 亿港元的募资规模。

item.title: 华强北商家：图纸全泄露也造不出真 iPhone
item.guid: 华强北商家：图纸全泄露也造不出真-iPhone
item.description:
According to reports from Sina Tech and Time Finance, multiple sellers in Huaqiangbei and veteran figures in the mobile phone industry have explicitly stated that it is absolutely impossible for Huaqiangbei to replicate a genuine iPhone. 据新浪科技、时代财经报道，多位华强北卖家与资深手机圈人士明确表示，华强北绝无可能复刻 iPhone 真机。

Despite recent large-scale leaks of original factory data such as complete motherboard schematics for the iPhone 18 Pro, A20 Pro chip manuals, and supplier lists, and even though Huaqiangbei possesses the world's most complete supply chain for mobile phone components, industry insiders point out that there are two insurmountable technical barriers to replicating a genuine device: 尽管近期 iPhone 18 Pro 的完整主板图纸、A20 Pro 芯片手册及供应商清单等原厂资料大规模泄露，且华强北拥有全球最完整的手机零部件供应体系，但从业者指出，复刻真机存在两道无法逾越的技术壁垒：

    First, Apple's self-developed A-series chips, whose core architecture and 2nm production process are strictly blocked externally, with no market channels for acquisition;

    Second, the closed-loop iOS operating system, whose underlying encryption and hardware binding mechanisms are difficult to crack.

Currently, Huaqiangbei can only produce highly appearance-restored counterfeit phones based on leaked data. These devices mostly run modified Android systems, with huge gaps in performance, fluidity, and ecosystem experience compared to genuine products, and cannot enjoy official Apple after-sales warranty. 目前，华强北仅能基于泄露资料产出外观高度还原的山寨机。这类设备多搭载修改版安卓系统，在性能、流畅度及生态体验上与正版差距巨大，且无法享受苹果官方售后保修。

item.title: 小米汽车官宣新子品牌 SkyNomad「天空游牧者」
item.guid: 小米汽车官宣新子品牌-SkyNomad「天空游牧者」
item.description:
This morning, Xiaomi Auto officially announced its new independent sub-brand via its official WeChat public account, named "SkyNomad," which translates to "Sky, Nomad" in Chinese. This marks Xiaomi Auto's first official confirmation of the brand's existence. 今日早晨，小米汽车通过官方微信公众号正式官宣旗下全新独立子品牌，命名为「SkyNomad」，中文释义为「天空，游牧者」。这也是小米汽车首次以官方渠道确认该品牌的存在。

Previously, according to multiple sources, Xiaomi Auto was preparing to launch a household SUV sub-brand centered on extended-range technology, with trademark registrations and spy photos of test vehicles being successively exposed. 此前，据多方消息透露，小米汽车正筹备推出一个以增程技术为核心的家用 SUV 子品牌，并有商标注册及测试车谍照陆续曝光。

item.title: OpenAI 首席未来学家将离职
item.guid: OpenAI-首席未来学家将离职
item.description:
According to WIRED, OpenAI's chief futurist Joshua Achiam informed colleagues yesterday that he would be leaving at the end of this month, concluding nearly nine years of service. In an internal memo to employees, Achiam stated that his departure was not due to any specific reason but was a decision made after a period of reflection. 据 WIRED 报道，OpenAI 首席未来学家 Joshua Achiam 昨日通知同事，他将于本月底离职，结束近九年的任职生涯。Achiam 在发给员工的内部信中表示，此次离职并非出于某一特定原因，而是经过一段时间思考后的决定。

Achiam joined OpenAI as an intern in 2017, later becoming a research scientist focused on AI safety, and was known internally for his steadfast commitment to the company's safety mission. Achiam 于 2017 年以实习生身份加入 OpenAI，此后成为专注于 AI 安全的研究科学家，并在内部以坚定维护公司安全使命著称。

His position was at the intersection of the AI safety and policy teams, with responsibilities including researching the potential harms and benefits arising from the rise of artificial intelligence, and collaborating with senior executives such as Chris Lehane, Head of Global Affairs, to promote government regulatory policies consistent with OpenAI's mission. 他的职位处于 AI 安全与政策团队的交叉地带，工作内容包括研究人工智能兴起所带来的潜在危害与收益，以及配合全球事务负责人 Chris Lehane 等高层，推动与 OpenAI 使命相符的政府监管政策。

item.title: xAI 正式更名 SpaceXAI
item.guid: xAI-正式更名-SpaceXAI
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Elon Musk's AI company xAI officially completed its brand rebranding yesterday, changing its name to SpaceXAI. Along with this renaming, the company simultaneously launched a new logo and updated its official account on the social media platform X. 据《商业内幕》报道，马斯克旗下的 AI 公司 xAI 已于昨日正式完成品牌重塑，更名为 SpaceXAI。伴随此次更名，该公司同步启用了全新 Logo，并更新了其在社交平台 X 上的官方账号。

This restructuring stems from SpaceX's acquisition of xAI in February this year. The deal integrates Musk's aerospace business, AI business, and social media platform X under a single structure. Musk stated in May this year that xAI would no longer exist as an independent company but would be merged into SpaceX as its AI business unit. 此次重组源于 SpaceX 在今年 2 月对 xAI 的收购。该交易将马斯克旗下的航天业务、AI 业务以及社交媒体平台 X 整合至同一架构下。马斯克曾于今年 5 月表示，xAI 将不再作为独立公司存在，而是并入 SpaceX 成为其 AI 业务部门。

item.title: 《恋与深空》宣布退出 BilibiliWorld 2026，承诺全额补偿玩家出行损失
item.guid: 《恋与深空》宣布退出-BilibiliWorld-2026，承诺全额补偿玩家出行损失
item.description:
The official "Love and Deepspace" yesterday issued an announcement, stating the cancellation of its participation in BilibiliWorld 2026 and promising full compensation for players' travel losses incurred due to this. 《恋与深空》官方昨日发布公告，宣布取消参加 BilibiliWorld 2026 展会，并承诺对玩家因此产生的出行损失进行全额补偿。

The official announcement shows that for players who canceled their exhibition trips due to this, Papergames will compensate them for the handling fees or non-refundable losses incurred from canceling tickets, air tickets, train tickets, and hotels in Shanghai. This covers relevant orders with travel dates from July 8th to July 13th, and accommodation check-in dates from July 8th to July 12th. 官方公告显示，针对因此取消展会行程的玩家，叠纸游戏将对其退订门票、机票及火车票、上海市内酒店所产生的手续费或无法退订的损失进行补偿，覆盖出行日期为 7 月 8 日至 7 月 13 日的相关订单，住宿入住日期覆盖范围为 7 月 8 日至 7 月 12 日。

Previously, on June 22nd, Papergames officially unveiled the sixth male protagonist, 'Ao Yin,' for 'Love and Deepspace' via a PV. This character, appearing with a Westernized modeling style, has a clear visual difference from existing characters and lacks main story groundwork, sparking widespread discussion among players. 此前，叠纸游戏于 6 月 22 日通过 PV 正式公开了《恋与深空》第六位男主角「敖尹」。该角色以欧美化建模风格登场，与既有角色存在明显视觉差异，且缺乏主线剧情铺垫，引发玩家大规模讨论。

According to a report by The Beijing News, comments under the relevant Weibo post have exceeded 1 million, with a higher proportion of negative comments. 据《新京报》报道，相关微博下评论已超 100 万条，负面评论占比较高。

item.title: 💡 Google 前高管：22 岁 AI 原生代员工效率已超越资深员工
item.guid: 💡-Google-前高管：22-岁-AI-原生代员工效率已超越资深员工
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Clay Bavor, a former Google executive and co-founder of AI startup Sierra, recently stated in an interview that 22-year-old graduates with AI literacy are demonstrating unique advantages in the workplace. 据《商业内幕》报道，Google 前高管、AI 创业公司 Sierra 联合创始人 Clay Bavor 近日在接受采访时表示，具备 AI 素养的 22 岁毕业生在职场中正展现出独特优势。

He pointed out that while some AI-native employees lack traditional work experience, their proficiency with AI tools and intuitive application have surpassed many senior employees, making them the most efficient group within the company. 他指出，部分 AI 原生代员工虽然缺乏传统工作经验，但其对 AI 工具的熟练程度和应用直觉已超越许多资深员工，成为公司内部最高效的群体。

As a former Google executive, Clay Bavor founded Sierra in 2023. He observed that AI is narrowing the gap between junior and senior employees. In his view, students who have extensively experimented with generative AI during college have a practical advantage in integrating new technologies into business processes, and many companies are eager to introduce this capability. 作为 Google 前高管，Clay Bavor 于 2023 年创立了 Sierra。他观察到 AI 正在缩小初级员工与资深员工之间的差距。在他看来，这些在大学期间长期实验生成式 AI 的学生，在将新技术融入业务流程方面具有实际优势，许多公司都渴望引入这种能力。

To screen for such talent, Sierra has adjusted its engineering interview process. The company no longer relies on traditional coding tests but instead asks candidates to build an application using their preferred AI programming tools, with the company covering the associated token costs. Interviewers then ask candidates to review the entire build process. 为了筛选此类人才，Sierra 已经调整了工程面试流程。公司不再依赖传统的编程笔试，而是要求候选人使用自己偏好的 AI 编程工具构建一个应用程序，并由公司支付相关的 Token 费用。面试官随后会要求候选人复盘整个构建过程。

Clay Bavor expects that within the next two months, all interview stages at the company will include in-depth AI-native assessment components. Clay Bavor 预计，在未来两个月内，公司所有的面试环节都将包含深度的 AI 原生考核组件。

item.title: 全球首款 AI 智能体手机将首秀
item.guid: 全球首款-AI-智能体手机将首秀
item.description:
According to Cailian Press, the Shanghai Municipal Government held a press conference yesterday morning, where Tang Wenkan, Director of the Shanghai Municipal Commission of Economy and Informatization, stated that the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference and the High-level Conference on AI Global Governance will focus on AI hotspots, delving into new industry trends around topics such as world models, open-source agents, AI Coding, Token economy, and OPC. 据财联社报道，昨日上午上海市政府举行新闻发布会，上海市经济信息化委主任汤文侃在会上表示，2026 世界人工智能大会暨人工智能全球治理高级别会议聚焦 AI 热点，将围绕世界模型、开源智能体、AI Coding、Token 经济、OPC 等议题，深入探讨行业新趋势。

The exhibition will feature the debut of the latest AI products, including the industry's largest supernode Huawei Atlas 950 physical machine, the industry-leading MiniMax M3 multimodal large model, Jietiao Agent operating system, near-memory computing 3D chip, the world's first AI agent smartphone, and several humanoid robots, AI dexterous hands, and other major new products, all to be showcased at the conference. 展览将首发首秀最新 AI 产品，业界最大规模超节点华为 Atlas 950 真机亮相，行业领先的 MiniMax M3 多模态大模型、阶跃 Agent 操作系统、近存计算 3D 芯片、全球首款 AI 智能体手机，以及多款人形机器人、AI 灵巧手等重磅新品，都将在大会展出。

item.title: Claude Cowork 上线移动端
item.guid: Claude-Cowork-上线移动端
item.description:
Claude Cowork announced yesterday that its AI work agent functionality will officially expand to mobile and web platforms, allowing users to initiate, monitor, and resume tasks on any device. Beta testing has now begun a phased rollout to Max plan users, with other subscription tiers to follow in the coming weeks. Claude Cowork 昨日宣布，其 AI 工作智能体功能将正式扩展至移动端与网页端，用户今后可在任意设备上发起、监控和接续任务。Beta 测试目前已开始向 Max 计划用户分阶段推送，其他订阅层级将在未来数周内陆续跟进。

    Task status synchronized across devices: Users can start a task on a desktop, then check its progress on a mobile phone, and retrieve the completed output on any device.

    Background automatic execution capability: After the user closes the device, Claude can continue to advance tasks in the cloud, without the need for the local device to remain online.

    Decision nodes remain user-controlled: When Claude encounters a stage requiring user judgment, it will actively push notifications to the mobile phone, allowing users to adjust the task direction in real-time. The final output will only be executed after user confirmation.

Web users can initiate Cowork sessions directly from the claude.ai homepage; iOS and Android users can access it via the Claude app sidebar. 网页端用户可直接从 claude.ai 首页发起 Cowork 会话；iOS 与 Android 用户可通过 Claude 应用侧边栏进入。

item.title: 蚂蚁灵波发布 LingBot-Depth 2.0，训练数据扩至 1.5 亿规模
item.guid: 蚂蚁灵波发布-LingBot-Depth-2.0，训练数据扩至-1.5-亿规模
item.description:
Ant Lingbo yesterday released the spatial perception model LingBot-Depth 2.0 and simultaneously open-sourced the visual foundation model LingBot-Vision. 蚂蚁灵波昨日发布空间感知模型 LingBot-Depth 2.0，并同步开源视觉基座模型 LingBot-Vision。

LingBot-Depth is designed for real-world depth completion, essentially enhancing robots' 3D perception capabilities in scenarios where traditional depth cameras often fail, such as with transparent, reflective, or dense objects. LingBot-Depth 面向真实场景深度补全，相当于为机器人补足透明、反光、密集物体等传统深度相机容易失效场景中的三维感知能力。

Compared to version 1.0, LingBot-Depth 2.0's training data has expanded from 3 million to 150 million, achieving first place in 12 out of 16 depth completion benchmarks; in indoor scenarios with large areas of missing depth, the depth error RMSE decreased from 0.132 to 0.062. 相比 1.0 版本，LingBot-Depth 2.0 的训练数据从 300 万扩展至 1.5 亿规模，在深度补全基准 16 项测评中获得 12 项第一；在室内大面积深度缺失场景中，深度误差 RMSE 从 0.132 降至 0.062。

LingBot-Vision uses 'boundary structure' as its pre-training objective and offers four open-source versions: ViT-G/L/B/S. LingBot-Vision 则以「边界结构」作为预训练目标，提供 ViT-G/L/B/S 四个开源版本。

💻 GitHub: 💻 GitHub：

github.com/robbyant/lingbot-vision github.com/robbyant/lingbot-vision

🤗 Hugging Face: 🤗 Hugging Face：

huggingface.co/collections/robbyant/lingbot-vision huggingface.co/collections/robbyant/lingbot-vision

👾 ModelScope: 👾 ModelScope：

modelscope.cn/collections/Robbyant/LingBot-Vision modelscope.cn/collections/Robbyant/LingBot-Vision

item.title: 港大开源 AI 智能体导师 DeepTutor v1.5
item.guid: 港大开源-AI-智能体导师-DeepTutor-v1.5
item.description:
The HKU Data Intelligence Lab (HKUDS) recently released the open-source AI agent tutor DeepTutor v1.5, which features multiple upgrades in its document parsing engine, RAG ingestion pipeline, and Python 3.14+ compatibility. 港大数据智能实验室（HKUDS）近日发布了开源 AI 智能体导师 DeepTutor v1.5，该版本在文档解析引擎、RAG 摄取管线及 Python 3.14+ 兼容性上完成了多项升级。

DeepTutor's core design philosophy integrates six teaching stages—chatting, quizzing, research, visualization, problem-solving, and learning path planning—into a single agent operational loop. Students can switch between different tasks without interrupting the backend engine, and learning context and multi-level memory are automatically synchronized. DeepTutor 的核心设计思路是将聊天、测验、研究、可视化、解题与学习路径规划六个教学环节并入同一个智能体运行闭环，学生在不同任务间切换时无需中断后台引擎，学习上下文与多层级记忆会自动同步流转。

The system employs a hybrid personalization engine, combining Static Knowledge Graph (SKG) and Dynamic Learner Memory (DPM). Through a "tracking forest" mechanism, each interaction trajectory is consolidated into multi-resolution learner profiles, ensuring that every teaching conclusion provided by the AI can be traced back to specific textual evidence or error records. 系统采用混合个性化引擎，结合静态知识溯源（SKG）与动态学习者记忆（DPM），通过「追踪森林」机制将每次互动轨迹沉淀为多分辨率的学习者画像，使 AI 给出的每一步教学结论均可回溯至具体文本证据或错题记录。

💻 GitHub: 💻 GitHub：

github.com/HKUDS/DeepTutor github.com/HKUDS/DeepTutor

item.title: 星巴克携手 MOLLY 推出新饮品
item.guid: 星巴克携手-MOLLY-推出新饮品
item.description:
Yesterday, Starbucks China announced another upgrade to its Soft Snow Frappuccino series and, for the first time, collaborated with Pop Mart's leading IP, MOLLY, to launch several co-branded beverages and merchandise. 昨日，星巴克中国宣布再度升级软雪星冰乐系列，并首度携手泡泡玛特旗下头部 IP MOLLY 推出多款联名饮品及周边产品。

This newly upgraded Soft Snow Frappuccino series is inspired by Italian handcrafted ice cream (Gelato) and includes three core beverages. 此次全新升级的软雪星冰乐系列以意式手作冰淇淋（Gelato）为灵感，共包含三款核心饮品。

Among them, the debut new Rice Cheese Soft Snow Frappuccino is made with imported Mascarpone cheese and glutinous rice grains; the Cocoa Hazelnut Soft Snow Frappuccino uses Nutella hazelnut cocoa spread as its base; additionally, the popular Italian Pistachio Soft Snow Frappuccino returns, featuring Italian imported pistachio paste and pistachio cookie crumbs. 其中，首发新品米芝士软雪星冰乐采用进口马斯卡彭芝士与糯香米粒调配；可可榛果软雪星冰乐则以 Nutella 榛果可可酱为基底；此外，往期爆款意式开心果软雪星冰乐同步回归，原料包含意大利进口开心果酱与开心果饼干碎。

For the co-branding initiative, Starbucks, in conjunction with MOLLY's 20th anniversary, customized three exclusive images: Mermaid, Little Painter, and Little Angel. They also simultaneously released custom transparent ice cups with a hollow design that change color with the beverage, along with various merchandise. 在联名企划方面，星巴克结合 MOLLY 诞生 20 周年节点，定制了美人鱼、小画家及小天使三款专属形象，并同步发售采用镂空设计、可随饮品变色的定制透明冰杯及多款周边商品。

Regarding offline channels, the Starbucks Reserve Beijing Solana store has been transformed into a MOLLY-exclusive theme store, and over 150 other stores nationwide have simultaneously launched MOLLY-themed ambiance decorations. 线下渠道方面，星巴克臻选北京蓝色港湾店已改造为 MOLLY 专属主题店，全国另有 150 余家门店同步上线 MOLLY 氛围主题布置。

item.title: 暑假机票价格跳水，多条热门航线票价低于高铁
item.guid: 暑假机票价格跳水，多条热门航线票价低于高铁
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, after the start of the summer travel season, influenced by increased flights and reduced fuel surcharges, this summer's air ticket prices are at a low point in recent years. Flight Manager monitoring shows that on July 5th, the fifth day of the summer travel season, the average economy class ticket price was 831.5 yuan, a decrease of 2.3% compared to 2025 and 7.6% compared to 2019. 据界面新闻报道，进入暑运后，受航班增加和燃油附加费下调影响，今年暑期机票价格处于近年低位。航班管家监测显示，7 月 5 日暑运第五天平均经济舱票价为 831.5 元，同比 2025 年下降 2.3%，同比 2019 年下降 7.6%。

According to data from Umetrip, flight prices from Beijing to Lvliang and Anshan start from 200 yuan, Beijing to Changzhi from 210 yuan, and Beijing to Yulin and Taiyuan from 220 yuan; from July 12th to 17th, the bare ticket price (excluding tax) from Chongqing to Daocheng is 199 yuan. 航旅纵横数据显示，北京至吕梁、鞍山航线价格 200 元起，北京至长治 210 元起，北京至榆林、太原 220 元起；7 月 12 日至 17 日，重庆至稻城不含税裸票价为 199 元。

According to Qunar Travel data, the average booking price for domestic flights departing from July 1st to 7th is nearly 20% lower than last year, with some routes even cheaper than high-speed rail tickets during the same period. 去哪儿旅行数据显示，7 月 1 日至 7 日起飞的国内机票预订均价同比去年低近两成，部分航线低于同期高铁价格。

item.title: 淘宝闪购内测独立社交 App「亮圈」
item.guid: 淘宝闪购内测独立社交-App「亮圈」
item.description:
According to "Dujia" news, Taobao Flash Sale is testing an independent social App called "Liangquan," whose official public account has been launched, with Hangzhou Koukouxiangchuan Network Technology Co., Ltd. as the certified entity. 据「读佳」消息，淘宝闪购正在测试一款独立社交 App「亮圈」，官方公众号已上线，认证主体为杭州口口相传网络技术有限公司。

Business registration information shows that Liu Hualei is the legal representative and manager of the company, and Zhang Yudong is the supervisor. Public information indicates that the two are separately associated with Ele.me platform business and Taobao Flash Sale risk control and security. 工商信息显示，该公司法人和经理为刘华雷，监事为张玉东；公开信息中，二人分别与饿了么平台业务、淘宝闪购风控安全相关。

Bright Circle primarily focuses on vertical social networking that links online and offline, and it is also Taobao Flash Sale's first independent product with social attributes. The product targets the local life market, covering scenarios such as city-wide events, interest groups, and offline dating. Users can register online for offline activities, join interest circles, and guide online topic discussions towards offline meetings and fulfillment. 亮圈主打线上线下联动的垂直社交，也是淘宝闪购首款带社交属性的独立产品。产品瞄准本地生活市场，覆盖同城活动、兴趣圈子、线下交友等场景，用户可在线报名线下活动、加入兴趣圈层，并把线上话题交流导向线下见面和履约。

item.title: 《气体人第一号》上线，Netflix 联合《釜山行》编剧打造
item.guid: 《气体人第一号》上线，Netflix-联合《釜山行》编剧打造
item.description:
According to The Hollywood Reporter, Netflix's series 'The Gas Human No. 1,' a collaboration with Japan's Toho, has been released globally, consisting of eight episodes. This marks Toho's first venture into streaming series. 据 The Hollywood Reporter 报道，Netflix 与日本东宝合作的剧集《气体人第一号》已在全球上线，共八集。这是东宝首次涉足流媒体剧集。

The series is adapted from Toho's 1960 tokusatsu film of the same name. The original was directed by Ishirō Honda, who also directed the first 'Godzilla,' with special effects by master Eiji Tsuburaya, and it was the third installment in Toho's 'Transforming Human' sci-fi horror series. 该剧改编自东宝 1960 年的同名特摄电影，原作由曾执导初代《哥斯拉》的本多猪四郎导演、特效大师圆谷英二操刀，是东宝「变身人间」科幻惊悚系列的第三部。

The new version is directed by Shinzo Katayama, telling the story of a Tokyo assassin who commits crimes in a deformable, ethereal gas form. Yu Aoi and Shun Oguri star, with the role of the Gas Human played by newcomer Uta, who started as a model. 新版由片山慎三执导，讲述一名东京杀手以可变形、无实体的气体形态作案的故事，苍井优、小栗旬出演，气体人一角由模特出身的新人 Uta 饰演。

The screenplay was written by South Korean director Yeon Sang-ho and his long-time collaborator Ryu Yong-jae. Yeon Sang-ho previously gained attention for works such as 'Train to Busan' and 'Seoul Station.' 剧本由韩国导演延相昊与其长期合作者柳容才撰写，延相昊此前凭《釜山行》《首尔车站》等作品受到关注。

item.title: SCP 基金会首部大银幕作品，《V/H/S: SCP.》计划明年发布
item.guid: SCP-基金会首部大银幕作品，《V/H/S:-SCP.》计划明年发布
item.description:
According to blogger 'Watchmen Hollywood,' the well-known found-footage horror film series 'V/H/S' will develop a new film themed around the 'SCP Foundation,' titled 'V/H/S: SCP.' The film is scheduled for theatrical release next year. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，知名伪纪录片风格恐怖片系列《致命录像带》（V/H/S）将开发一部以「SCP 基金会」为主题的新电影，定名为《V/H/S: SCP.》。该片计划于明年在院线上映。

As the first work related to the series' 'online co-creation literature' project, the film will continue the short film anthology format of found footage. 作为该系列「在线共创文学」相关项目的首部作品，电影将延续拾得录像（Found Footage）的短片选集形式。

The film's core focuses on the video evidence collected, edited, and archived by the SCP Foundation, a secret organization, showcasing the 'containment breach' process of various anomalous objects, entities, or events through multiple independent narrative segments. 影片核心聚焦于 SCP 基金会这一秘密组织所收集、编辑和归档的视频证据，通过多个独立的叙事段落展现不同异常物件、实体或事件的「收容失效」过程。

In terms of production, the film is handled by Spooky Pictures, with producers Josh Goldbloom and Michael Schreiber, who have previously worked on multiple 'V/H/S' series films, taking charge of the production. 制作方面，该片由 Spooky Pictures 影业负责，曾参与《致命录像带》系列多部作品的制片人 Josh Goldbloom 和 Michael Schreiber 担纲制作。
